summaries.Ahşap panel ve gri alt bölümle tasarlanm: Modern steel door with a wood panel and gray lower section. Distinguished by a long metallic handle and robust security features.

summaries.Antrasit gri ve açık meşe rengi dikey pa: Stepped design with interlocking vertical panels in anthracite gray and light oak. Matte black vertical handle and clean modern lines—a refined choice for apartment entrances.
